title: Question: simulator in a dynamic object (.so)
body:
---


Author Name: **Felix Bors** (@felixbors)
Original Redmine Message: 1910 from https://www.veripool.org



---

I am trying to compile a small Verilog module into a dynamic object
(ex  Verilog ->  /cpp's  ->   . /obj_dir/VTop.so )
The hope is to load this object from my numpy Python/Ctypes C code and use 
that as a testbench (inject signals from numeric simulations in numpy 
into this digital simulator via Ctypes).

I had no luck so far generating this .so
I added -fPIC to VK_CPPFLAGS_ALWAYS in include/verilated.mk and
 -shared to LDFLAGS but still no luck (I end up with 
a static library)

Is there a way to do this?  
thank you
Felix Bors
